values.content:
=You are a resume parser. Extract the following fields from this resume text and return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation).

Fields to extract:
- full_name (string)
- email (string, lowercase) 
- phone (string)
- current_role (string)
- current_company (string)
- previous_company (string)
- total_experience (string like "6 years")
- skills (string, comma-separated)
- education (string)
- current_location (string)
- current_ctc (string)
- expected_ctc (string) 
- notice_period (string)
- linkedin_url (string)

Use empty string "" for any field not found.

Resume text:
{{ $node["Prepare Resume Binary3"].json["resume_plain_text"] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.candidates_master (
  full_name, email, phone, linkedin_url,
  "current_role", current_company, previous_company, total_experience,
  skills, education, current_location,
  current_ctc, expected_ctc, notice_period,
  resume_url,
  first_source, created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_full_name }}', 255),        ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT(LOWER('{{ $json.sq_email }}'), 255),     ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_phone }}', 255),            ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_linkedin_url }}', 255),     ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_current_role }}', 255),     ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_current_company }}', 255),  ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_previous_company }}', 255), ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_total_experience }}', 255), ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_skills }}', 255),           ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_education }}', 255),        ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_current_location }}', 255), ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_current_ctc }}', 255),      ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_expected_ctc }}', 255),     ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_notice_period }}', 255),    ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.sq_resume_url }}', 255),       ''),
  'naukri_bulk',
  NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET
  full_name         = CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(COALESCE(EXCLUDED.full_name, ''))) > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.full_name    ELSE candidates_master.full_name END,
  phone             = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone,             candidates_master.phone),
  "current_role"    = COALESCE(EXCLUDED."current_role",    candidates_master."current_role"),
  current_company   = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.current_company,   candidates_master.current_company),
  previous_company  = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.previous_company,  candidates_master.previous_company),
  total_experience  = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.total_experience,  candidates_master.total_experience),
  skills            = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.skills,            candidates_master.skills),
  education         = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.education,         candidates_master.education),
  current_location  = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.current_location,  candidates_master.current_location),
  current_ctc       = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.current_ctc,       candidates_master.current_ctc),
  expected_ctc      = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.expected_ctc,      candidates_master.expected_ctc),
  notice_period     = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.notice_period,     candidates_master.notice_period),
  linkedin_url      = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.linkedin_url,      candidates_master.linkedin_url),
  resume_url        = CASE WHEN NULLIF(EXCLUDED.resume_url,  '') IS NOT NULL THEN EXCLUDED.resume_url  ELSE candidates_master.resume_url  END,
  updated_at        = NOW()
RETURNING
  id::text    AS candidate_id,
  full_name   AS candidate_name,
  email       AS candidate_email,
  phone       AS candidate_phone;

INSERT INTO public.position_profiles (
  tenant_id, job_position_id, candidate_id,
  ingest_email, ingest_name,
  source, source_profile_id,
  resume_web_link, resume_google_file_id, consent_status,
  is_downloaded,
  scoring_status, recruiter_status,
  created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.tenant_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.job_position_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.candidate_id }}'::uuid,
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.candidate_email }}', 255), ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.candidate_name }}', 255),  ''),
  'naukri_bulk',
  '{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.queue_file_id }}',
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.resume_url }}', 500), ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.drive_file_id }}', 255), ''),
  'confirmed',
  true,
  'pending', 'pending',
  NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (job_position_id, candidate_id) DO UPDATE SET
  resume_web_link = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.resume_web_link, position_profiles.resume_web_link),
  resume_google_file_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.resume_google_file_id, position_profiles.resume_google_file_id),
  source          = 'naukri_bulk',
  is_downloaded   = true,
  updated_at      = NOW()
RETURNING id::text AS position_profile_id;

UPDATE public.upload_queue_files
SET
  status               = '{{ $json.q_status }}',
  parsed_name          = COALESCE(NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.q_parsed_name }}', 255),  ''), parsed_name),
  parsed_email         = COALESCE(NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.q_parsed_email }}', 255), ''), parsed_email),
  parsed_phone         = COALESCE(NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.q_parsed_phone }}', 50),  ''), parsed_phone),
  created_candidate_id = '{{ $json.q_candidate_id }}'::uuid,
  created_position_profile_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.q_pos_profile_id }}', '')::uuid,
  error_message        = NULL,
  processed_at         = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.q_queue_file_id }}'::uuid
RETURNING id::text AS updated_file_id;

SELECT
  jp.id::text AS job_position_id,
  jp.tenant_id::text AS tenant_id,
  lower(trim('naukri_bulk')) AS ingest_source,
  CASE
    WHEN lower(trim('naukri_bulk')) IN ('naukri', 'naukri_bulk', 'naukri_upload', 'form_resume_ingest', 'resume_upload_admin')
      OR lower(trim('naukri_bulk')) LIKE 'naukri_%'
      THEN NULLIF(trim(t.drive_naukri_folder_id::text), '')
    ELSE NULLIF(trim(t.drive_safalhire_folder_id::text), '')
  END AS drive_upload_folder_id,
  t.drive_naukri_folder_id,
  t.drive_safalhire_folder_id,
  COALESCE(t.drive_status, false) AS drive_status
FROM public.job_positions jp
INNER JOIN public.tenants t ON t.id = jp.tenant_id
WHERE jp.id = '{{ $json.job_position_id }}'::uuid
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO public.position_profiles (
  tenant_id, job_position_id, candidate_id,
  ingest_email, ingest_name,
  source, source_profile_id,
  resume_web_link, resume_google_file_id, consent_status,
  is_downloaded,
  scoring_status, recruiter_status,
  created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.tenant_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.job_position_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.candidate_id }}'::uuid,
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.candidate_email }}', 255), ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $json.candidate_name }}', 255),  ''),
  'naukri_bulk',
  '{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.queue_file_id }}',
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.resume_url }}', 500), ''),
  NULLIF(LEFT('{{ $("Extract AI Fields").item.json.drive_file_id }}', 255), ''),
  'confirmed',
  false,
  'pending', 'pending',
  NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (job_position_id, candidate_id) DO UPDATE SET
  resume_web_link = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.resume_web_link, position_profiles.resume_web_link),
  resume_google_file_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.resume_google_file_id, position_profiles.resume_google_file_id),
  source          = 'naukri_bulk',
  is_downloaded   = false,
  updated_at      = NOW()
RETURNING id::text AS position_profile_id;

body.resume_plain_text: MANI SHANKAR Safety Engineer Email: manishkumr85@gmail.com 7 + Year of Experience Np: 60 Days Phone: +91 - 7000136301, +91 - 9074867509 Profile : Professional Summary : Experienced Safety Engineer with strong background in infrastructure and industrial safety management. Skilled in implementing EHS standards, conducting safety audits, incident investigation, and coordinating with project teams to ensure safe operations. E xperienced in large infrastructure projects and industrial supply chain environments including Tata Steel operations. Professional Experience Safety Engineer – AARVEE Associates (Feb 2026 – Present), Vadodara, Gujarat Project: Mumbai – Ahmedabad High Speed Rail Project (Bullet Train Project) – TCAP PMC • Managing safety operations for infrastructure construction project. • Ensuring compliance with national and international EHS standards. • Reviewing contractor SHE documentation and reports. • Preparing Safety Observation Reports (SOR) and Non - Conformance Reports (NCR). • Conducting safety inspections and enforcing corrective measures. • Coordinating training programs to improve safety culture. • Maintaining safety records for audits and reporting. Senior Team Leader & Safety Officer – Digitide Solutions / Conneqt Business Solutions / Quess Corp (Jul 2019 – Feb 2026), Jharkhand Client: Tata Steel Ltd – Coal By - Product Operations & Supply Chain • Supervised safety in coal by - product dispatch through railway and trucks. • Conducted safety inspections and monitored dispatch operations. • Managed workforce safety compliance and permit systems. • Conducted safety training programs, toolbox talks, and mock drills. • Investigated incidents and prepared safety reports. • Implemented PPE, Lockout/Tagout, and emergency response plans. Safety Associate – Randstad India Pvt Ltd (Feb 2019 – Jun 2019), Jharkhand Client: Tata Steel Ltd • Monitored safety during coal dispatch operations. • Conducted safety briefings for drivers and staff. • Maintained safety documentation and regulatory compliance. • Coordinated with logistics teams to reduce safety risks. Page 2 Key Safety Responsibilities • Implementation of SHE Management Plans • Site safety inspections and safety audits • Toolbox talks and safety training programs • Incident investigation and reporting • Permit to work system management • Emergency response planning and mock drills • Contractor safety compliance monitoring Skills • Vendor Risk Assessment and Audit Coordination • Safety Campaign Planning and Implementation • Risk Assessment and Safety Audits • MS Office, SAP SD, PowerPoint, SQL • Manpower Handling and Team Coordination • Public Speaking and Communication Languages • English – Good (Speak, Read, Write) • Hindi – Excellent (Speak, Read, Write) Internships & Projects • Site Safety Supervisor Training – JNTVTI Tata Steel, Dhanbad • Coal By - Product Supply Chain and Sales Operations • Utility Project Arch Bridge Construction – Bhopal Municipal Corporation Additional Information • Hobbies: Riding bikes, music, singing, volleyball, cricket Education • B.E. Civil Engineering – Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal (2016) • MBA (POM & Marketing Management – Distance) – Swami Vivekanand Subharti University, Meerut (2021) • PG Diploma in Fire Safety & Hazard Management – Rabindranath Tagore University, Bhopal (2019) • Fire Safety & Disaster Management Training – National Academy of Fire & Safety Engineering (NAFS), Nagpur (2019) Activities and Interests • Theater, environmental conservation, art, hiking, skiing, travel
